calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Petitioner Allison Michelle Cannon was sworn and examined. Court hears evidence and grants the decree changing the name to Ali Michael Cannon and gender from female to male. Decree signed in open court.
